fullArticle:
EXCLUSIVE: CBS Studios plans to make a supernatural splash at San Diego Comic-Con later this month.

The hit comedy series Ghosts is returning to the convention center for a supersized panel block alongside the upcoming vampire comedy from the same creators, Eternally Yours. The panels will take place on Friday, July 24 from 11:15am – 12:30pm in Ballroom 20.

First up will be Ghosts where, for the fifth consecutive year, the cast and creators will unpack the previous season and tease what’s to come at Woodstone Mansion. This year, attendees can expect to see eries stars Utkarsh Ambudkar, Asher Grodman, Sheila Carrasco, Román Zaragoza and executive producers/showrunners, Joe Port and Joe Wiseman.
